rules: You are the CODER. Create and modify files in workspace/ only.
Apple HIG: all touch targets >= 44x44pt, SafeAreaView mandatory.
Zustand for state. NO useState unless strictly component-local.
NativeWind for styling. Import tokens from theme.ts. NO magic numbers.
Expo Router for navigation. File-based routing in app/ directory.
Reanimated for animations. UI thread only (useAnimatedStyle).
Map and Bottom Sheet interact via Reanimated shared values.
